new_classes.label_en: Still fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must, in containers > 2 l (CN 2206 00 89)
new_classes.label_de: Ruhiges gegorenes Getränk aus konzentriertem Traubenmost, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2206 00 89)
new_classes.definition_en: Still (non-sparkling) fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must (not from the natural fermentation of must from fresh grapes), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN heading 2206 00 89.

coverage_explanation:
The proposed axioms capture the three primary discriminating criteria for CN 2206 00 89:
1. The beverage is produced from concentrated grape must (not from the natural fermentation of fresh grape must) — modelled via ConcentratedGrapeMustFermentedBeverageQuality and negation of FreshGrapeOriginQuality.
2. The beverage is still (non-sparkling and non-semi-sparkling) — modelled via complement restrictions on SparklingWineQuality and SemiSparklingWineQuality.
3. Presented in containers holding more than 2 litres — modelled via BFO has_part some LargeContainer (≥ 2 L as defined in the TBox; note the TBox defines LargeContainer as ≥ 2 L, but the legal text implies > 2 L; this is a minor gap as the boundary value 2 L is covered by the sibling 22060051).

The note also clarifies that beverages made from concentrated grape must (which can be stored and fermented later) are included under 2206 00 51/89 rather than 2204. This exclusion from 2204 is implicit in the class hierarchy (subClassOf OtherFermentedBeverages2206 rather than WineFreshGrapesGrapeMust2204).

Partial coverage gap: The property 'producedBy' in the TBox has range BFO:Process and is functional, but its IRI uses the eucn namespace (eucn:producedBy), whereas the restriction above mistakenly uses an obo/eucn path. Additionally, the 'other' residual category aspect (i.e., not piquette, not sparkling, not the ≤2 L variant) is partially covered by the LargeContainer restriction and the complement restrictions, but a full closed-world negation of all other 2206 subclasses is not feasible in OWL without nominals. The producedBy process restriction uses the correct FermentationProcess2206 but the property IRI path was corrected. Coverage score reflects these minor modelling limitations.
